## Skill Submission

**Skill name**:
**Description**:

### Checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter includes name, description, version
- [ ] `superskill-cli skill validate` passes
- [ ] Content under 3000 tokens
- [ ] Triggers array with 3-7 keywords
- [ ] No promotional or commercial content
- [ ] Tested with at least one AI tool
